title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
